summary: Monte Carlo simulation: median ~5.59, slight downward bias from declining Treasury yields
content: Last value: 5.633 on Feb 12. 10Y Treasury declining (4.29→4.09). Daily vol ~0.044-0.061. 9 business days forward. Blended MC gives P10=5.40, P50=5.59, P90=5.78. Mild downward drift consistent across methods.
